# 文档：Fury of the Fallen

- 类别：charms
- 标识：fury-of-the-fallen
- 来源：wiki/Fury_of_the_Fallen
**位置**: King's Pass — found in an alcove above the cliffs, near the very start of the game.

<b>Fury of the Fallen</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It increases Nail damage by 75% when at 1 Mask. Note that this works only when the Knight has only 1 Mask left (No projectiles are sent at 1 Mask if Fury of the Fallen is not equipped). While at one Mask, gaining any Lifeblood Masks negates the effect of Grubberfly's Elegy but not the effect of Fury of the Fallen.
}}

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
Prior to the  <i>:Category: Lifeblood</i> update, when Fury of the Fallen was activated, the screen was bordered with wispy red lines and the Knight was circled in a red icon. Subsequently, the red circle was removed and the effect around the Knight was changed to be a red smoke.

It is useless during  Hall of Gods#Fighting Bosses boss fights, as it is not possible to reach one Mask of health.
The Knight usually has a :File:Knight One Mask.gif that plays while at 1 Mask; however, it does not play while having this Charm equipped.
If the Knight has the Fury of the Fallen, Hiveblood, Joni's Blessing, and Glowing Womb Charms equipped, the effects of Fury of the Fallen all apply normally while at 1 Mask; however, if Hiveblood brings the Knight up to 2 Masks, the Nail and Nail Art damage continue to benefit from Fury of the Fallen while newly-spawned Hatchlings do not.

Notes

---

---

# 文档：Gathering Swarm

- 类别：charms
- 标识：gathering-swarm
- 来源：wiki/Gathering_Swarm

<b>Gathering Swarm</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It spawns a swarm that collects dropped Geo.

Usefulness
This Charm is primarily used to grind Geo more easily. It is useful for collecting Geo that falls into spikes, thorns, and hard to reach places. If the area is exited before all Geo has been collected, it is lost (Geo carried by the swarm that has not yet reached the Knight is not lost).

Gathering Swarm does not collect Geo that falls into acid, Geo that is dropped by Grubfather, or Geo rewarded for completing a Trial in the Colosseum of Fools.

How to Acquire
Bought from Sly in Dirtmouth for .
Shop description:
<i>Do you find yourself leaving a lot of Geo behind as you hurry through the caverns?
This charm will make sure that any loose change finds its way back to you.</i>

Charm Combo Tips

---

---

# 文档：Glowing Womb

- 类别：charms
- 标识：glowing-womb
- 来源：wiki/Glowing_Womb

<b>Glowing Womb</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It uses SOUL to spawn Hatchlings which deal 9 damage to Enemies (Hollow Knight) on contact.

Usefulness
A build using this Charm should be Nail-focused and efficient at dodging, as there is less SOUL to use for healing or casting Spells and having a passive assistant in combat may be useful.

How to Acquire
Glowing Womb can be acquired in the Forgotten Crossroads. The entrance is hidden to the right of the False Knight arena in the ceiling after a series of columns. There is a spike tunnel that can only be traversed after the Crystal Heart has been acquired. The area where the Charm is acquired is Infected even before triggering the Infected Crossroads. The Charm itself is found on the body of a giant Aspid Mother.

The area itself is littered with Aspid Hunters and Aspid Mothers, both of which also show up in an arena where a fair number of them need to be fought before Glowing Womb can be acquired.

Charm Synergies

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
When resting on a Bench (Hollow Knight), the Hatchlings rest on the ground after a few moments.
Due to a bug, Hatchlings do not target Galien.
Hatchlings despawn after removing the Charm and exiting the Charm configuration screen.
Hatchlings despawn when using the Stagways.
Hatchlings carry over when challenging a boss in Godhome, despite not appearing to. They immediately charge towards the boss and attack. It is currently unknown whether this is a glitch or intentional.
Due to a bug, Hatchlings target False Knight empty armour.
Hatchlings also target Hornet Sentinel's spike balls.
When riding lifts, sometimes Hatchlings spawn in the floor and get stuck.
In the Hollow Knight Press Kit the Hatchling's file is titled "knightling".
If the Knight has either the Grimmchild or Carefree Melody Charm equipped, the Hatchlings try to attack Millibelle at her bank in Fog Canyon. This deals no damage, but prevents the Knight from using her banking service, unless Grimmchild is in its first Phase.

Regular Hatchling
Regular Hatchling Resting
Explosive Hatchling
Explosive Hatchling Resting

Notes

---

---

# 文档：Grimmchild

- 类别：charms
- 标识：grimmchild
- 来源：wiki/Grimmchild

<b>Grimmchild</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It summons the Grimmchild which deals varying levels of damage depending on its Phase.

Usefulness
When equipped, the Grimmchild floats behind the Knight. In its first Phase, it does nothing else. However, collecting Flames allows for upgrading it to Phases 2, 3, and 4. In these Phases, the Grimmchild shoots a fireball at enemies that deal increasing damage at each Phase.

Wearing Grimmchild activates unique dialogue when speaking with the White Lady.

How to Acquire
Grimmchild is given by Troupe Master Grimm in Dirtmouth after The Grimm Troupe (Lore) has been summoned. Having Grimmchild equipped reveals three flames around Hallownest. These can be absorbed by the Grimmchild after defeating the Grimmkin Novices which guard them. Returning to Grimm after this upgrades the Grimmchild, causing it to deal 5 damage.

After this, three more flames can be collected which are guarded by Grimmkin Masters. Subsequently returning to Grimm initiates a boss fight with him. Upon defeating Grimm, the Grimmchild is upgraded and deals 8 damage.

Finally, three more flames which are guarded by Grimmkin Nightmares have to be collected. There is also a fourth flame in Deepnest which can be collected by talking to Brumm, requiring no combat. Having three flames and then using the Dream Nail on Grimm starts the fight with Nightmare King Grimm. When he is defeated, the Grimmchild is in its final form and deals 11 damage.

Phases
align="center" width="25%" |Phase 1
align="center" width="25%" |Phase 2
align="center" width="25%" |Phase 3
align="center" width="25%" |Phase 4
align="center" |Starting appearance
align="center" |Collect 3 total Flames and return to Grimm
align="center" |Collect 6 total Flames and defeat Troupe Master Grimm
align="center" |Collect 9 total Flames and defeat Nightmare King Grimm
align="center" |Does not deal damage
align="center" |5 damage per shot
align="center" |8 damage per shot
align="center" |11 damage per shot

Trivia

If Grimmchild is not in its first Phase, it tries to attack the Hunter during his first encounter in Greenpath and Millibelle when she is at her bank in Fog Canyon. This deals no damage to either of them, but does prevent the Knight from using Millibelle's banking service.
Regardless of Grimmchild's Phase, this also causes Weaversong and Glowing Womb to attack her, though they do not prevent the Knight from using her services.
When resting at a Bench (Hollow Knight), the Grimmchild companion rests on the ground beside the Knight.
If the Knight is too far from the Grimmchild, there is a short animation of it teleporting back to the Knight.
If Grimmchild is equipped in  Godhome, the Grimmchild does not appear to aid the Knight in fights against Grimm and Nightmare King Grimm.
Grimmchild not appearing during battles against Troupe Master Grimm and Nightmare King Grimm has no effect on whether the Knight is Overcharmed.
It is suggested that after Nightmare King Grimm has been defeated, the Grimmchild will eventually grow up to replace Grimm.
The Grimmchild charm is the only charm that changes with a quest. It's also the only charm that has its description change.

References

---

---

# 文档：Grubberfly's Elegy

- 类别：charms
- 标识：grubberflys-elegy
- 来源：wiki/Grubberfly's_Elegy
**位置**: Grubfather's reward for rescuing all 46 grubs.

<b>Grubberfly's Elegy</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. When at full Masks, it causes Nail strikes to fire a projectile which deals 50% Nail damage per hit. Note that this works only when the Knight has only 1 Mask left (No projectiles are sent at 1 Mask if Fury of the Fallen is not equipped). While at one Mask, gaining any Lifeblood Masks negates the effect of Grubberfly's Elegy but not the effect of Fury of the Fallen.
|Charm3 = Mark of Pride
|Charm3Desc = Increases the height of the projectiles from Grubberfly's Elegy by 35%.
}}

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
Grubberfly's Elegy may be based upon the w:c:zelda:Sword Beam ability from various games in <i>w:c:zeldaThe_Legend_of_Zelda_(Series)</i> where being at full health while using your weapon fires out a similar projectile.

# 文档：Heavy Blow

- 类别：charms
- 标识：heavy-blow
- 来源：wiki/Heavy_Blow

<b>Heavy Blow</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It increases an Enemies (Hollow Knight) knockback when hit by Nail strikes or Nail Arts. It also reduces the number of hits required to Combat (Hollow Knight)#Boss Staggers a Bosses (Hollow Knight) by 1.

Usefulness
High knockback can be useful for enemies who have an uninterruptible attack, like the Massive Moss Charger and the Wandering Husk. Using Heavy Blow against this kind of enemy usually pushes them back far enough to prevent their attack from hitting the Knight, allowing for more consecutive attacks, a chance to escape and heal, and safer Nail attacks for enemies with high range (thus removing the need for a ranged Spells and saving SOUL). However, this Charm should not be used against ranged enemies and Warrior Dreams such as No Eyes and Gorb (especially considering that they cannot be staggered), as it is harder to deal  consistent damage to them from a distance.

Enemies that do not take knockback are not affected by Heavy Blow's increased knockback. This includes most Bosses (Hollow Knight).

Since Heavy Blow decreases the hits needed to stagger a boss by 1, it can be useful during boss fights.

How to Acquire
Bought from Sly for  after bringing him the Shopkeeper's Key found in the Crystal Peak.
Shop description:
<i>You enjoy smacking about foes with that nail of yours, right? With this charm equipped, you'll be able to send them flying further with every hit!</i>

Charm Combo Tips

Notes

---

---

# 文档：Hiveblood

- 类别：charms
- 标识：hiveblood
- 来源：wiki/Hiveblood

<b>Hiveblood</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It heals the last Mask that was lost without having to use Focus. It also makes Enemies (Hollow Knight) in the Hive passive.

Usefulness

The regenerating Mask is marked by a small blob of dripping honey that slowly grows bigger. Taking damage again while regenerating starts the process over (at the Knight current health). In the case of an attack that deals two Masks of damage (such as an explosion), Hiveblood only regenerates one Mask. Finally, healing a Mask with Focus ends the regeneration in progress.

Hiveblood <i>does</i> regenerate Lifeblood Masks gained from the Joni's Blessing Charm, though it takes twice as long (24s). Other sources of Lifeblood — like Lifeblood Cocoons, or the Lifeblood Heart and Lifeblood Core Charms — are not affected.

Hiveblood is decent in combat if the Knight can dodge a boss effectively, but has trouble finding opportunities to heal. As the Knight is likely to not go on the offensive while waiting for Hiveblood to regenerate health, Hiveblood pairs well with Charms that can damage foes while dodging, such as Glowing Womb or Sharp Shadow.

The best use of Hiveblood is to regenerate health in situations where SOUL is not readily available. This makes it very helpful in difficult platforming sections with few enemies, such as the Crystallised Mound in the Crystal Peak, the path to Nailmaster Sheo in Greenpath, the Nail-jumping section to reach a Vessel Fragment in Deepnest, and most prominently, the White Palace and the  Path of Pain.

It also serves as the only means by which health may be recovered mid-air, making it useful for the Colosseum of Fools.

Its ability to render the Hive's residents passive makes it very useful on return trips to the area.

How to Acquire
Located in the Hive, below the room where the  Hive Knight is fought. Requires defeating the Hive Knight.

Charm Synergies

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
Despite the Hive enemies turning friendly while wearing Hiveblood, their Dream Nail dialogues still show hostility towards the Knight.
Before the  <i>:Category: Lifeblood</i> update, this Charm could be collected simply by walking through the open room after Vespa room, without having to fight the  Hive Knight.

---

---

# 文档：Joni's Blessing

- 类别：charms
- 标识：jonis-blessing
- 来源：wiki/Joni's_Blessing

<b>Joni's Blessing</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It changes all Masks to Lifeblood Masks and increases Masks by 40% (rounded up). When selecting the  Shell Bindings in the  Pantheons, it increases Masks from 4 to 7 (10 with Fragile Heart/ Unbreakable Heart).

Number of Lifeblood Masks
<b>Masks</b>
<b>Lifeblood Masks</b>
5
7
6
9
7
10
8
12
9
13
10
14
11
16

The 40% increase in Masks granted by Joni's Blessing only takes into account the base Masks and the two Masks added by Fragile/ Unbreakable Heart. Masks added by Lifeblood Heart and Lifeblood Core are not included in the calculation.

Usefulness

When having Joni's Blessing equipped it becomes easier to enter the Abyss#Lifeblood_Core_Room in the Abyss. With 8-9 Masks and Fragile Heart/ Unbreakable Heart or Lifeblood Heart, it is easy to make the 15-Mask threshold, thus earning Lifeblood Core.

As with Lifeblood Heart and Lifeblood Core, Joni's Blessing is more useful in a Spells-focused build where SOUL can be used to cast Spells rather than heal. As such, it should be saved for later in the game when more Notches have been acquired, but Lifeblood Core remains inaccessible.

However, Lifeblood Core is usually a more efficient Charm for adding survivability in the endgame. Joni's Blessing adds at most 5 Lifeblood Masks while Lifeblood Core adds 4, costs 1 less Notch, and does not prevent healing.

How to Acquire
Found in Joni's Repose in the Howling Cliffs. The Charm is resting on the corpse of Blue Child Joni.

Charm Synergies

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
Reaching 1 Mask while having this Charm equipped does not create black streaks across the screen.
If the Knight dies, the HUD displays a single empty Mask, representing a maximum of 1 regular Mask. This affects the Knight's Shade health and causes it to die in one hit.
There is a glitch where the Knight occasionally gains one additional Mask after they have taken damage to what is supposedly their last available Lifeblood Mask. This additional Mask is a normal white Mask but is covered in the black fog effect until destroyed.
The actual formula of Lifeblood masks (as in code) is: . For max health 5 and 10, floating point precision problem cause  and , resulting 7 and 14 Lifeblood Masks, respectively.

---

---

# 文档：Kingsoul

- 类别：charms
- 标识：kingsoul
- 来源：wiki/Kingsoul

<b>Kingsoul</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It generates 4 Soul every 2 seconds. It also opens an area at the bottom of the Abyss where it can be turned into Void Heart.

Usefulness
Kingsoul is a fairly useful Charm for exploration and platforming challenges, being superior to Hiveblood in that it can recharge Soul for healing even with full Masks. However, the high Notch cost prevents other useful Charm combinations from being equipped.

Because Kingsoul allows gaining Soul without having to hit Enemies (Hollow Knight) with the Nail, it can be effective for those who are both patient and prefer to cast Spells. This approach is especially useful when delivering the Delicate Flower, as engaging enemies directly can be risky.

This Charm is primarily only equipped to unlock the The Abyss#Birthplace at the bottom of the Abyss, after which it is permanently replaced by Void Heart.

Wearing Kingsoul unlocks extra dialogue with the White Lady.

How to Acquire
Kingsoul is obtained after getting both White Fragments. The left half of Kingsoul is given by the White Lady in the Queen's Gardens, the right half is taken off the body of the Pale King after completing the White Palace.

After getting both halves, the Kingsoul is automatically created and replaces the slot where the half of the Kingsoul previously resided.

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
From the locations where the halves can be acquired, it can be inferred that the Higher Beings mentioned in its description are the White Lady and the Pale King.
Kingsoul is the only Charm that takes up five Notches. This means it is also the most costly Charm.
Both halves of the Kingsoul are required before it counts toward the Charm count for Salubra shop and Completion (Hollow Knight) percentage.
Kingsoul is inaccessible in  Godseeker Mode.

---

---

# 文档：Lifeblood Core

- 类别：charms
- 标识：lifeblood-core
- 来源：wiki/Lifeblood_Core

<b>Lifeblood Core</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It adds 4 Lifeblood Masks when resting at a Bench (Hollow Knight).

Usefulness
As with Lifeblood Heart, this Charm is useful if the Knight focuses on Spells, as it allows them to use more of their SOUL on casting rather than healing. However, it is the most difficult Lifeblood Charm to obtain.

Arguably the best Lifeblood Charm, as it provides twice as many Masks as Lifeblood Heart with only one extra Notch cost, and does not turn all Masks into Lifeblood, unlike Joni's Blessing, allowing for healing if necessary. While having 9 Masks, Lifeblood Core grants the same number of Masks as Joni's Blessing.

How to Acquire
On the left wall of the Abyss is a door that only opens when having 14 or more Lifeblood Masks, or 15 or more when using Joni's Blessing. This can be reached through the Lifeblood Heart Charm and by killing Lifeseeds. Joni's Blessing also converts the extra health from Fragile Heart/ Unbreakable Heart into Lifeblood Masks.  Dreamgate can be used to warp to the door without obstacles.

The Charm is found sitting on a dais at the end of the chamber.

There is also an Arcane Egg in the same area. Once Lifeblood Core is picked up, the Knight is immediately ejected from the room and the door becomes permanently closed, so it is recommended to pick up the Arcane Egg first and then the Charm.

Charm Combo Tips

---

---

# 文档：Lifeblood Heart

- 类别：charms
- 标识：lifeblood-heart
- 来源：wiki/Lifeblood_Heart
**位置**: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.

<b>Lifeblood Heart</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It adds 2 Lifeblood Masks when resting at a Bench (Hollow Knight).

Usefulness
As with Lifeblood Core, this Charm is useful if the Knight focuses on Spells, as it allows them to use more of their SOUL on casting rather than healing. The lower cost is useful for saving Notches, but 2 Lifeblood Masks are not very significant compared to Lifeblood Core's four Masks or even healing Charms like Quick Focus and Hiveblood.

How to Acquire
Bought from Salubra in the Forgotten Crossroads for .
Shop description:
<i>Have you ever drunk that bright blue liquid, 'lifeblood'? It's a bit of a taboo, but it makes you feel much healthier doesn't it?
This charm seeps lifeblood and will certainly improve your constitution!</i>

Charm Combo Tips

---

---

# 文档：Longnail

- 类别：charms
- 标识：longnail
- 来源：wiki/Longnail
**位置**: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.

<b>Longnail</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It increases the range of the Nail by 15%.

Usefulness
It is useful for keeping distance from more dangerous Enemies (Hollow Knight) and for performing safer Nail#Nail-bouncing.

While it has a slightly shorter range than the Mark of Pride Charm, it is acquired with less challenge and has a lower Notch cost. In most normal combat, the range difference is negligible.

It does not affect the range of Nail Arts or Grubberfly's Elegy.

How to Acquire
Bought from Salubra in the Forgotten Crossroads for .
Shop description:
<i>That nail you wield is adorable! But do you sometimes feel it could be a little... longer?
Ho! Ho ho ho! Go on, take this charm home with you. Suddenly, your enemies will be within reach...</i>

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
Longnail increases the range of the Nail by expanding the wearer's aura.

Notes

References

---

---

# 文档：Nailmaster's Glory

- 类别：charms
- 标识：nailmasters-glory
- 来源：wiki/Nailmaster's_Glory

<b>Nailmaster's Glory</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It reduces the time needed to charge Nail Arts.

Usefulness
With the Pure Nail's power to kill most base Enemies (Hollow Knight) in one hit, combined with this Charm's charging speed, many areas can be cleared incredibly quickly, making challenge rooms and backtracking much easier. It especially shines in the Colosseum of Fools, where it makes it easier to take down some of the tougher enemies.

Having Nailmaster's Glory unlocks new dialogue with Nailmaster Mato, Nailmaster Oro, Nailmaster Sheo, and Sly.

How to Acquire
Given by Sly after receiving all 3 Nail Arts from the Nailmasters:
Nailmaster Mato
Nailmaster Oro
Nailmaster Sheo

Trivia
The design of the Charm heavily resembles the head of the Nailmasters.

Notes

---

---

# 文档：Quick Focus

- 类别：charms
- 标识：quick-focus
- 来源：wiki/Quick_Focus
**位置**: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.

<b>Quick Focus</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It makes focusing SOUL ~33% faster.

Usefulness
Allows the Knight to cast Focus ~33% faster, not including the startup time (0.25 seconds). Startup time is not affected by Quick Focus. Though the Charm is costly, it makes healing in the middle of combat much more forgiving. Extremely useful in situations with lots of combat such as Bosses (Hollow Knight) fights and arenas (notably the Colosseum of Fools).

Allows healing where it is possible to get interrupted while Focusing or healing twice in situations where normally it is only possible to heal once.

How to Acquire
Bought from Salubra in the Forgotten Crossroads for .
Shop description:
<i>The crystal set in the centre is lovely, isn't it? Exquisite, even! I've heard that crystals help you to "focus", so if that's something you're interested in you should take this beauty home!</i>

Charm Synergies

Charm Combo Tips

Notes

---

---

# 文档：Shape of Unn

- 类别：charms
- 标识：shape-of-unn
- 来源：wiki/Shape_of_Unn
**位置**: Talk to the slug atop Lake of Unn in Greenpath after acquiring Isma's Tear.

<b>Shape of Unn</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It allows for moving while using Focus.

Usefulness
Movement is limited; it is not possible to jump or use any movement abilities during this time and there is still a startup and ending animation for the Focus.

Since Shape of Unn makes the Knight smaller and shorter, it is possible to avoid attacks from certain Bosses (Hollow Knight) by ducking under them when healing. For example, this works for the Mantis Lords Dash attack, however, it does not work for  Paintmaster Sheo Paint Spear attack.

How to Acquire
Acquired from Unn beneath the Lake of Unn. Requires Isma's Tear.

Charm Synergies

Trivia
The Knight does not change shape when using Focus to kill the Dreamers or absorb the Infection from the Hollow Knight.
Oddly Deep Focus doesn't reduce movement speed. Therefore, allowing the Knight to move (at 6 or 12) for a longer period of time.
This Charm turns the Knight into a snail while using Focus. Using it in combination with Baldur Shell and Spore Shroom changes how the snail body looks in addition to granting the Charm combo.

width="25%"|
width="25%"|
width="25%"|
width="25%"|

# 文档：Soul Catcher

- 类别：charms
- 标识：soul-catcher
- 来源：wiki/Soul_Catcher

<b>Soul Catcher</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It increases the amount of SOUL gained when hitting Enemies (Hollow Knight) with the Nail.

Usefulness
One of the earliest Charms available in the game. Its effect is not drastic but it remains useful for quite a long time for healing purposes, especially in areas where enemies have attacks that are difficult to avoid or SOUL is scarce.

How to Acquire
Found at the very end of the Ancestral Mound, after killing the Elder Baldur.

Charm Combo Tips

---

---

# 文档：Soul Eater

- 类别：charms
- 标识：soul-eater
- 来源：wiki/Soul_Eater

<b>Soul Eater</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It greatly increases the amount of SOUL gained when hitting Enemies (Hollow Knight) with the Nail.

Usefulness
This Charm is very useful for accumulating a large amount of excess SOUL and should be considered for combat situations where it is dangerous or impossible to use the Dream Nail. It generates more SOUL per notch than Soul Catcher (the SOUL gain from Soul Eater is about triple that of Soul Catcher, at twice the notch cost), but is less flexible to slot without Charms#Overcharmed.

It is often useful on Radiant difficulty battles in the  Hall of Gods as it is the only 4-notch Charm (for Overcharming purposes) that has any use on Radiant difficulty.

How to Acquire
Found in the Resting Grounds. Requires Desolate Dive/Descending Dark.

Use Desolate Dive/Descending Dark on the grave just under the Stag Station then head east in the passageway. The Charm is found next to the sarcophagus of a Snail Shamans.

Charm Combo Tips

---

---

# 文档：Spore Shroom

- 类别：charms
- 标识：spore-shroom
- 来源：wiki/Spore_Shroom

<b>Spore Shroom</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. When using Focus, it releases a cloud of damaging spores around the Knight.

Usefulness
Spore Shroom is useful to damage slow or static enemies after healing for a decent amount of damage, ignoring shields. This makes the Charm very effective against Crystal Hunters, Stalking Devouts, Heavy Sentry, and other Enemies (Hollow Knight), as well as in the confined arena in the Colosseum of Fools.

It has great use in the Broken Vessel and the Lost Kin fights, as the spore cloud instantly kills the Infected Balloons spawned during the fights.

It damages neutral enemies of Mantis Village and The Hive, turning them aggressive. It also damages Oomas, triggering their explosion, so it is recommended to not heal near them.

Wearing Spore Shroom allows the Knight to understand the mushroom language, in particular:
Mister Mushroom regular dialogue
Mushroom Lore Tablets (Hollow Knight) in the Fungal Wastes
Mister Mushroom Lore Tablet in Kingdom's Edge

After using Spore Shroom, it cannot be used again for 4.25 seconds, or until the Knight takes damage.

How to Acquire
This Charm is located in the Fungal Wastes near a pool of acid, close to the entrances to the Queen's Gardens and Deepnest. Requires Mantis Claw.

Charm Synergies

Trivia
Using Shape of Unn in combination with Baldur Shell and Spore Shroom changes how the snail body of the Knight looks in addition to granting the Charm combo.

width="25%"|
width="25%"|
width="25%"|
width="25%"|

Notes

# 文档：Sprintmaster

- 类别：charms
- 标识：sprintmaster
- 来源：wiki/Sprintmaster

(For the NPC in Hollow Knight: Silksong, see Sprintmaster Swift)

<b>Sprintmaster</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It increases run speed by ~20%.

Usefulness
The additional speed is only applied while the Knight is grounded and not impeded by walk-zones or liquid such as acid or water.

The Sprintmaster Charm can be useful when fighting quick, agile bosses, such as Hornet.

How to Acquire
Bought from Sly in Dirtmouth after acquiring the Shopkeeper's Key for .
Shop description:
<i>You like it? It's a recent addition to my collection. Handsome thing, isn't it?
Holding it lets you run around quickly and tirelessly, as though you were young again! Or, erm, so I'm told.</i>

Charm Synergies

Notes

---

---

# 文档：Stalwart Shell

- 类别：charms
- 标识：stalwart-shell
- 来源：wiki/Stalwart_Shell
**位置**: Sly's shop in Dirtmouth.

<b>Stalwart Shell</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It increases invincibility frames and reduces hit recoil.

Usefulness
This item primarily shines in some Bosses (Hollow Knight) battles, especially ones where it is difficult to avoid getting hit. The longer invulnerability time can provide a window to attack a boss with impunity, potentially overwhelming them with sheer damage.

It is also useful in the Trial of the Fool, which features many encounters with enemies whose attacks are hard to dodge.

How to Acquire
Bought from Sly in Dirtmouth for .
Shop description:
<i>Life in Hallownest can be tough, always taking hits and getting knocked around. This charm grants you more time to recover after taking damage. Useful if you need to escape from a tight spot.</i>

Charm Combo Tips

Notes

---

---

# 文档：Steady Body

- 类别：charms
- 标识：steady-body
- 来源：wiki/Steady_Body
**位置**: Salubra's hut in the Forgotten Crossroads.

<b>Steady Body</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It removes horizontal knockback from Nail hits.

Usefulness
In addition to removing knockback from hitting Enemies (Hollow Knight), spikes, and walls, it also prevents the Knight from being knocked left or right when jumping on purple mushrooms without using the Nail. It does not remove the knockback from hitting purple mushrooms horizontally or any vertical knockback, such as from Nail#Nail-bouncing.

How to Acquire
Bought from Salubra for  in the Forgotten Crossroads.
Shop description:
<i>I love the simple design on this little fellow! Very classy! It's made out of a nice, solid, heavy material too.
Wear it and you'll be able to stay firmly in place when swinging your little nail around. </i>

Charm Combo Tips

---

---

# 文档：Thorns of Agony

- 类别：charms
- 标识：thorns-of-agony
- 来源：wiki/Thorns_of_Agony

<b>Thorns of Agony</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It causes the Knight to sprout thorny vines when taking damage which damage nearby Enemies (Hollow Knight).

Usefulness
The Thorns of Agony deal damage equal to the base damage of the Nail, capable of hitting twice if within range. The main downside of this Charm is that it deals damage without collecting SOUL, and, in some situations, it may kill easier enemies that would have been useful for regaining SOUL.

The animation for Thorns of Agony also takes up invincibility frames as the Knight cannot be controlled until the animation is over. This reduces the number of invincibility frames that the Knight has to move or reposition.

This Charm is particularly useful when fighting multiple enemies at the same time, especially in the Colosseum of Fools.

This charm is not recommended for use in Fog Canyon as damaging Oomas makes them burst, releasing their explosive core that home in on the Knight, dealing two Masks of damage.

How to Acquire
Found in Greenpath in a maze of thorns featuring Charged Lumafly. Requires Mothwing Cloak to reach.

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
When using the  Bindings in any  Pantheons, Thorns of Agony's damage is not affected. Its damage is also not affected by the Fragile Strength/ Unbreakable Strength and Fury of the Fallen Charms.

---

---

# 文档：Unbreakable Greed

- 类别：charms
- 标识：unbreakable-greed
- 来源：wiki/Unbreakable_Greed

<b>Fragile Greed</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It increases the amount of Geo that is dropped by Enemies (Hollow Knight).

Usefulness
It is recommended to use this Charm in situations where death is unlikely, such as exploration, or in tandem with survivability-increasing Charms, while avoiding its use in boss battles.

The obvious downside is that once broken, Leg Eater only repairs it for a price. Late-game, the Geo may not be much of an issue, but the trip may be. Dreamgate can be used to reach Leg Eater more easily.

Unlike the other two fragile Charms, Fragile Greed is not useful for Dream Boss battles since Dream Bosses drop no Geo.

Lastly, it should be noted that its drawback is negated in Steel Soul Mode runs since the run is over upon death anyway, making Fragile Greed a much more useful Charm in a Steel Soul run.

How to Acquire
Purchased from Leg Eater in the Fungal Wastes for . Wearing the Defender's Crest Charm causes Leg Eater to lower the cost to .
Shop description:
<i>Very, very, special and valuable charm! Do you want to find more Geo? Hold this charm and go hunting!
Then bring any Geo you find back to me!</i>

When broken, Leg Eater can repair it for , or, while wearing Defender's Crest, for .
Shop description when broken:
<i>It's broken now, and its power is sleeping. Very sad! Give me Geo, and I'll fix it.</i>

Once the Grimm Troupe has been summoned, Divine becomes accessible in Dirtmouth. To get the unbreakable version of Fragile Greed, it must be equipped before listening to her, then it must be given to her when prompted. She eats the Charm, and then asks for . Once the Geo is paid, she gives the unbreakable version of Fragile Greed, Unbreakable Greed.

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
All extra Geo dropped by Fragile/ Unbreakable Greed has a white sheen to it and faster animations.
The Charm only affects Geo from defeating enemies and bosses, including ones that never respawn, such as Gorgeous Husk. It does not affect Geo gained from Geo Deposits, Chests, completing Trials at the Colosseum of Fools, Rescuing Grubs, selling Relics to Relic Seeker Lemm, selling Rancid Eggs to Steel Soul Jinn, getting Geo back from Millibelle, or defeating Gruz Mother.

Notes

---

---

# 文档：Unbreakable Heart

- 类别：charms
- 标识：unbreakable-heart
- 来源：wiki/Unbreakable_Heart
**位置**: Divine's tent in Dirtmouth, after the Grimm Troupe arrives.

<b>Fragile Heart</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It increases the Knight health by two Masks.

Usefulness
This Charm is quite potent, despite the fact that it breaks upon death. One way to make use of the Charm is to only use it in situations where dying is unlikely, such as exploration, or in tandem with survivability-increasing Charms, while avoiding its use in boss battles, except for Dream Boss battles and  Godhome battles (as the Charm does <b>not</b> break when dying to these bosses).

It is strictly superior in effect to the Lifeblood Heart Charm (except when using Grubberfly's Elegy)&nbsp;– for the same Notch cost, it provides two regular Masks which can be healed by Focusing.

The obvious downside is that once broken, Leg Eater only repairs it for a price. Late-game, the Geo may not be much of an issue, but the trip may be. Dreamgate can be used to reach Leg Eater more easily.

Lastly, it should be noted that its drawback is negated in Steel Soul Mode runs since the run is over upon death anyway, making Fragile Heart a much more useful Charm in a Steel Soul run.

How to Acquire
Purchased from Leg Eater in Fungal Wastes for . Wearing the Defender's Crest Charm causes Leg Eater to lower the cost to .
Shop description:
<i>This is a precious thing. A beautiful charm. I made it for you! If you hold it you'll feel a lot healthier.
If you're afraid of dying, you need this charm!</i>

When broken, Leg Eater can repair it for , or for  while wearing the Defender's Crest.

Shop description when broken:
<i>It's broken now, and its power is sleeping. Very sad! Give me Geo, and I'll fix it.</i>

Once the Grimm Troupe has been summoned, Divine becomes accessible in Dirtmouth. To get the unbreakable version of Fragile Heart, it must be equipped before listening to her, then it must be given to her when prompted. She eats the Charm, then asks for . Once the Geo is paid, she gives the unbreakable version of Fragile Heart, Unbreakable Heart.

Charm Combo Tips

Trivia
When using the  Bindings in any  Pantheons, the Masks granted by Fragile Heart are not affected.

---

---

# 文档：Weaversong

- 类别：charms
- 标识：weaversong
- 来源：wiki/Weaversong

<b>Weaversong</b> is a Charms in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It summons 3 Weaverlings that attack Enemies (Hollow Knight), dealing 3 damage per hit.

Usefulness
The Weaverlings attack automatically, making it a bit easier to deal damage to enemies that might be out of range.
If a Weaverling falls out of the world or loses track of the Knight, a new one will spawn after a few moments.

While wearing this Charm, Midwife has a new piece of dialogue and Dream Nail dialogue.

How to Acquire
Found in the upper part of Weavers' Den.

Charm Synergies

Trivia
If the Knight sits on a bench, the summoned Weaverlings will sit down on the ground next to them.
The animation for a Weaverling spawning shows it being woven out of thread.
In the  <i>:Category: Lifeblood</i> update, Weaverling damage was increased from 2 to 3, and both the Grubsong and Sprintmaster interactions were added.
However, the number of Weaverlings summoned was decreased by 1, from 4 to 3.
This charm is a creation of the Weavers.
If the Knight has either the Grimmchild or Carefree Melody Charm equipped, the Weaverlings try to attack Millibelle at her bank in Fog Canyon. This deals no damage, but prevents the Knight from using her banking service, unless Grimmchild is in its first Phase.

---

---

# 文档：Abyss Shriek

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：abyss-shriek
- 来源：wiki/Abyss_Shriek

<b>Abyss Shriek</b> is a Spells in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It is the upgrade to Howling Wraiths. Using it releases a blast of SOUL and Shadow above and around the Knight.

Function
Press FOCUS/CAST or QUICK CAST while holding UP to release a wave of energy in an arc with increased range around and above the Knight, dealing 4 bursts in quick succession.

It is 16 times stronger than an Old Nail, making it the second strongest unmodified attack in the game, with the only other contender being the combined six strikes of the Cyclone Slash Nail Art with the Channelled, Coiled, and Pure Nails.

Modifiers
Shaman Stone increases the damage dealt by Abyss Shriek by 50%.
Spell Twister lowers the SOUL cost to cast Abyss Shriek to 24 SOUL.

Damage Values

Charm
Damage Per Hit
Total Damage
None
20
80
Shaman Stone
30
120

How to Acquire
Stand on the pedestal in the room in the southwest part of the Abyss and use the Howling Wraiths Spell.

Trivia

Using the Dream Nail on the faces around the pedestal reveals a line of dialogue hinting at how to obtain the Abyss Shriek:
<i>"...Our voices... will cry out... again..."</i>

# 文档：Cyclone Slash

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：cyclone-slash
- 来源：wiki/Cyclone_Slash

<b>Cyclone Slash</b> is the Nail Art taught to the Knight by Nailmaster Mato. By holding ATTACK until fully charged, then releasing it while holding UP or DOWN, the Knight spins around like a cyclone while continuously attacking in their vicinity.

The attack consists of two phases. The first phase lasts about 0.45 seconds, during which the Knight performs a total of 3 hits. During the second phase, ATTACK can be repeatedly pressed to lengthen Cyclone Slash’s duration by up to 1.2 extra seconds, adding three more hits for a total of six. Each hit deals 1.25x Nail damage, pushing foes back in the process. While mashing ATTACK, the Knight's horizontal movement speed is greatly reduced. Similarly, if used in the air, the Knight falls much slower. However, if used in the air without pressing ATTACK, the Knight's fall speed is uncapped for the duration of the Nail Art. While performing this attack, the Knight cannot perform any actions, aside from moving left and right, until the Nail Art is finished. Taking damage cancels the Nail Art immediately.

The multi-hit spinning attack effectively covers both sides of the Knight. Because of this, Cyclone Slash can be effective against large swarms of foes, constantly dealing damage and pushing them back to prevent the Knight from being overwhelmed. Because of the attack’s ability to drastically reduce the Knight’s falling speed, it can be used against flying foes. However, in most cases, Great Slash is preferable.

The long duration of Cyclone Slash, coupled with the drastic movement speed reduction, results in a long duration of time in which the Knight is vulnerable to attack. Foes that are unable to be pushed back, or those whose projectiles cannot be deflected, can take advantage of the window of opportunity to inflict damage on the Knight. Furthermore, agile or light enemies can easily move out of Cyclone Slash’s range, resulting in sub-optimal damage.

How To Perform
Hold ATTACK until fully charged, then release ATTACK while holding UP/DOWN without Mothwing Cloak. Repeatedly pressing ATTACK extends the duration. Deals 1.25 x Nail damage/hit.

If this is the only Nail Art that has been learned, the ability executes regardless of direction or whether the Knight is dashing.

How To Acquire
Cyclone Slash is taught by Nailmaster Mato who resides in the Howling Cliffs.

Trivia
It is possible to reach 7 hits with Cyclone Slash in certain non-combat situations, for instance, while being in a Hot Spring. However, when hitting enemies, it is only possible to reach 6 hits.
A six-hit Cyclone Slash with the Channelled, Coiled, or Pure Nail is the most damaging unmodified attack available to the Knight.

# 文档：Dash Slash

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：dash-slash
- 来源：wiki/Dash_Slash

<b>Dash Slash</b> is the Nail Art taught to the Knight by Nailmaster Oro. By holding ATTACK until fully charged, then releasing while dashing with Mothwing Cloak or the Shade Cloak, the Knight releases a long-ranged melee attack at the end of the dash, extending far in front of them as well as roughly two-thirds as far behind them.

While being hit by an enemy during the dash animation cancels the attack, it is possible to execute a Dash Slash when using the Shade Cloak to dash through an enemy, striking the enemy with the backward hitbox of the Nail Art. In conjunction with the Sharp Shadow, Dashmaster, and Nailmaster's Glory Charms (filling a total of 5 Notches), a Dash Slash executed through the enemy can deal a combined total of 4x (1.5x+2.5x) Nail damage in <2 seconds.

How To Perform
Hold ATTACK until fully charged, then release during the execution of a DASH. Deals 2.5 x Nail damage.

Nailmaster Oro resides in Kingdom's Edge. The Nail Art can be purchased for .

# 文档：Descending Dark

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：descending-dark
- 来源：wiki/Descending_Dark

<b>Descending Dark</b> is a Spells in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It is the upgrade to Desolate Dive. Using it strikes the ground with concentrated SOUL and Shadow, breaking floors and damaging Enemies (Hollow Knight).

Function
Press FOCUS/CAST or QUICK CAST while holding DOWN to cause the Knight to slam into the ground, creating a shockwave that spreads further upwards than Desolate Dive, and bursts twice. The dive itself deals 15 damage, the left half of the first burst deals 35 damage, the right half deals 30, and the second burst deals 15 damage on either side, for a total of 60 or 65 damage.

Like Desolate Dive, using Descending Dark makes the Knight invincible for 0.4 seconds and allows breaking of some floors. Using Descending Dark in quick succession cancels the invincibility frames of the spell if it is cast while the previous Spell's invincibility frames have not yet run out.

It is also a great way to kill the Great Hopper in the Colosseum of Fools found in the Trial of the Conqueror

Modifiers
Shaman Stone increases the damage dealt by Descending Dark by 47%.
Spell Twister lowers the SOUL cost to cast Descending Dark to 24 SOUL.

Dive Damage
Shockwave 1 Damage
Shockwave 2 Damage

60 or 65

23

How to Acquire
It is found on a Snail Shamans corpse in Crystal Peak, within the Crystallised Mound. It is recommended to have the Lumafly Lantern in order to reach this area.

Trivia

Gained by absorbing the body of a snail shaman encased in crystal. Dream Nailing this snail gives the line:
<i>"...Free...me..."</i>
Descending Dark and Desolate Dive can be used while Dung Defender is underground to force him out and stagger him.

# 文档：Dreamgate

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：dreamgate
- 来源：wiki/Dreamgate

<b>Dreamgate</b> is an Spells and Abilities (Hollow Knight) in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It allows the Knight to place a warp point and then travel to it.

Function

Allows the Knight to place a Dreamgate at a location, then warp to it from anywhere. Only one Dreamgate can be placed at any time, and placing a new gate removes the previous one. Warping consumes 1 Essence. A Dreamgate can be warped to indefinitely, as long as the Knight has enough Essence.
Setting a Dreamgate takes ~3.5 seconds and warping to one takes ~2.75 seconds. The Dream Wielder Charms reduces both of these times by ~0.5 seconds.

Once set, an icon appears on the map, showing the location of the Dreamgate.

Limitations
The Dream Nail cannot be used to place or warp to a gate while moving or while inside the Ancestral Mound, either functioning Tram, the rooms in the City of Tears containing lifts to the Forgotten Crossroads and the Resting Grounds, Beast's Den, the White Palace, the Abyss#Lifeblood_Chamber, the Cast-Off Shell, the Dream_Realm#Dreams_related_to_Higher_Beings, the Dream_Realm#Miscellaneous_dreams, or the rooms containing the White Lady, the Hollow Knight, and the Radiance.

Additionally, the Dream Nail cannot be used to place a gate in any interior location (that is, any location not on the Map, including Dream Realm but excluding the room containing Seer), the Pleasure House and its lift shaft, all boss arenas that cannot be exited freely, most arenas that are closed by gates, all Husk Guard, Great Husk Sentry, Entombed Husk, and Stalking Devout spawn locations, various locations that can become inaccessible at any time, and the rooms containing Unn and Hive Knight.

Additionally, the Dream Nail cannot be used to warp to a gate while inside the room containing Soul Master.

How to Acquire
The Dreamgate is acquired in the Resting Grounds by talking to Seer after having acquired 900 Essence.
If a save file exists from before the <i>Hidden Dreams</i> update after Seer has already left, Dreamgate is automatically acquired upon loading the save.

Trivia
When warping out from a dream, the Knight wakes up at the point they entered the dream, instead of the Dreamgate. This does not consume any Essence.
Similarly, activating the Dreamgate during any of the fights in the  Hall of Gods or while in a  Pantheons causes the Knight to wake up in front of the respective statue/entrance.
Using the Dreamgate destroys the Delicate Flower.

---

---

# 文档：Focus

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：focus
- 来源：wiki/Focus

<b>Focus</b> is a Spells in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It allows the Knight to heal using SOUL.

Function
Hold down FOCUS/CAST to drain SOUL and regenerate health at a rate of 1 Mask per 33 SOUL. It takes 1.141 seconds to heal the first Mask including the initial startup time of 0.25 seconds.

Continuing to hold FOCUS/CAST continues to heal 1 Mask of health as long as the Knight has 33 or more SOUL. This takes 0.891 seconds and skips the startup time.

If the Knight does not have enough SOUL, it is not possible to use Focus. However, if Focus is used while at full health, or a full cast of Focus is not performed, stored SOUL is still used up. Getting hit by an enemy interrupts casting (even while protected by the Baldur Shell Charms or having the damage negated by the  Carefree Melody Charm) and wastes any SOUL used during the incomplete cast.

Modifiers
Several Charms change the way Focus works:
Baldur Shell gives protection while Focusing.
Deep Focus heals 2 Masks of health per Focus at a 65% slower rate.
Quick Focus allows the Knight to Focus 33% faster.
Equipping both Quick Focus and Deep Focus restores 2 Masks at a 10% slower rate compared to having neither equipped.
Joni's Blessing turns all Masks into Lifeblood, preventing the Knight from healing Masks when Focusing.
Shape of Unn allows the Knight to move while Focusing.
Spore Shroom creates a cloud of damaging spores after Focusing.

How to Acquire
The Knight starts the game with this ability. Additionally, there is a tutorial prompt that appears after the Knight passes the Focus Lore Tablets (Hollow Knight) in King's Pass and has enough SOUL to heal a missing Mask.

Trivia
A Lore Tablets (Hollow Knight)#King's Pass in King's Pass states the following:
<i>"Higher beings, these words are for you alone.
Your great strength marks you amongst us. Focus your soul and you shall achieve feats of which others can only dream."</i>

---

---

# 文档：Great Slash

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：great-slash
- 来源：wiki/Great_Slash

<b>Great Slash</b> is the Nail Art taught to the Knight by Nailmaster Sheo. By holding ATTACK until fully charged, then releasing ATTACK while neither Mothwing Cloak nor holding UP/DOWN, the Knight performs a powerful slash that inflicts 2.5x Nail damage. The slash reaches slightly farther than an attack enhanced by both the Longnail and Mark of Pride Charms, while also extending slightly below the Knight and reaching a full Knight's height above.

Because of its ability to inflict a large amount of damage in a short period of time, Great Slash can be capitalised upon when continuous attacks are hard to execute, such as against foes with small windows of vulnerability (e.g. Soul Twister). It can also be used in place of Spells against staggered bosses to deal a greater amount of damage than a regular slash. With its large range that extends above the Knight, Great Slash is especially effective against flying enemies.

How To Perform
Hold ATTACK until fully charged, then release without pressing UP/DOWN or dashing. Deals 2.5x Nail damage.

If this is the only Nail Art that has been learned, Great Slash is executed regardless of the direction being held but not while the Knight is dashing.

Damage
Fury of the Fallen Damage
Old Nail
12
22
Sharpened Nail

39
Channelled Nail
32

Nailmaster Sheo resides in Greenpath, reaching him requires the Monarch Wings or Crystal Heart.

# 文档：Mothwing Cloak

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：mothwing-cloak
- 来源：wiki/Mothwing_Cloak

The <b>Mothwing Cloak</b> is an Spells and Abilities (Hollow Knight) in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It allows dashing forward a short distance.

Function
Press DASH to dash a short distance in the direction the Knight is facing. Can be used in mid-air. The cooldown between dashes is 0.6 seconds. Refreshes when the Knight lands on the ground, bounces off an Enemies (Hollow Knight)/object with their Nail, or clings to/jumps off a wall using the Mantis Claw.

Allows the Knight to cross gaps too far to reach by jumping, and makes it easier to dodge enemies and their attacks.

Modifiers
Can be upgraded to the Shade Cloak.

The Dashmaster Charms reduces the cooldown between dashes from 0.6 seconds to 0.4 seconds. It also allows the Knight to dash downwards.

How to Acquire
Found on the body of a Vessels after defeating Hornet Protector in Greenpath in the boss arena.

Trivia
The original name for this item on the Hollow Knight Kickstarter was the Mothdust Cloak.

References

---

---

# 文档：Needolin

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：needolin
- 来源：wiki/Needolin

Needolin is a Silk Hornet unlocks in Act 1 of Hollow Knight: Silksong. Using it plays music while slowly draining the Silk Spool.

Function
Hold down the Needolin button to start playing music. Music will continue until you let go or all of your Silk is expended.

Using it near a Weavenest Door allows you to enter. These are important places that give you tremendous benefits.

Near NPCs, they will start singing along and reveal hidden dialogue, much like the Dream Nail from Hollow Knight.

In combat scenarios, the Needolin will pacify enemies and also reveal hidden dialogue from them.

Needolin can only be used on the ground. Getting attacked cancels the ability.

Modifiers
In Act 3, you will unlock 2 new abilities for the Needolin.
The first modifier you will unlock is the Beastling Call. This allows you to instantly travel back to the Bell Beast from almost anywhere. Unlocked after defeating the Bell Eater.
The second modifier you will unlock is the Elegy of the Deep. Required for obtaining the 3 hearts to continue with the story. This also allows you to explore Lost Verdania. After defeating the Green Prince, it is no longer accessible
Using the Tools tool increases the aforementioned functions of the Needolin

Trivia
Hornet can be seen playing the Needolin in the Reveal Trailer, next to the Chapel Maiden.

---

---

# 文档：Shade Cloak

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：shade-cloak
- 来源：wiki/Shade_Cloak

The <b>Shade Cloak</b> is an Spells and Abilities (Hollow Knight) in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It allows for dashing through Enemies (Hollow Knight) and their attacks, as well as Shade Gates.

Function
The Shade Cloak acts as an upgrade to the Mothwing Cloak.

Environmental hazards still deal damage. Dashing through most projectiles destroys the projectile.

The Shade Cloak has a small cooldown (1.5 sec) independent of the regular dash. This is indicated by shadow particles scattering around the Knight while it is on cooldown, then being absorbed into the Knight when it recharges. Dashing while the cooldown is in effect will result in a normal dash which does not phase through enemies.

The Dashmaster Charms does not reduce the Shade Cloak cooldown. It only reduces the normal dash cooldown.

Acquiring the Shade Cloak also unlocks new dialogue for Mask Maker.

Modifiers
The Sharp Shadow Charm causes the Shadow Dash to deal 1x Nail damage and increases dash length by 40%.

How to Acquire
Located in Abyss, to the very east, beyond the sea of Void. The Knight must first climb the lighthouse on the west side of the sea and activate the light in order to suppress the Void Tendrils blocking access to the Shade Cloak room. Once there, standing inside the bowl of the Void fountain results in Void permeating the Knight before the ability is granted.

Trivia
The Knight may shadow dash downwards with the Dashmaster Charm equipped.
Hitting the Ancient_Civilisation#Shade_Beast holding the bowl without having the Awoken Dream Nail makes a possible Seals#Possible_seals appear over its head.
Hitting it with the Awoken Dream Nail gives the line <i>"...Void... Power... Without unity..."</i>
After acquiring the Void Heart it gives <i>"...Lord of Shades..."</i>

---

---

# 文档：Shade Soul

- 类别：abilities
- 标识：shade-soul
- 来源：wiki/Shade_Soul

<b>Shade Soul</b> is a Spells in <i>Hollow Knight (game)</i>. It is the upgrade to Vengeful Spirit. Using it conjures a shadow that flies forward and damages Enemies (Hollow Knight).

Function
Press FOCUS/CAST or QUICK CAST without holding UP or DOWN to launch a projectile that passes through enemies and deals damage. The projectile now moves 12.5% faster and penetrates all objects in its path including walls and invulnerable parts of enemies, such as shields and shells, but does not damage a fully protected enemy.

Modifiers
Flukenest turns the Shade Soul into a horde of black baby flukes that bounce around dealing damage.
When Flukenest is combined with Defender's Crest, it launches a single large fluke that explodes into a damage-dealing cloud of gas.
Shaman Stone increases the width of the projectile and increases the damage dealt by 33%.
Spell Twister lowers the SOUL cost to cast Shade Soul to 24 SOUL.

Damage Values

None
colspan=3|30
